subtitle.en: deep-sea anglerfish do not glow themselves — they house Photobacterium bacteria in a lure organ; the fish feeds them and the bacteria produce continuous blue light to lure prey
subtitle.ko: 심해 아귀는 직접 빛나지 않음 — Photobacterium 세균을 esca에 키워 청색 발광

description.en: Anglerfish silhouette with esca lure. O₂ supply controls bacterial light production; fish can dim by restricting flow. Symbiotic mutualism, not self-bioluminescence.
description.ko: Anglerfish silhouette + esca 미끼. O₂ 공급이 세균 발광 제어; 차단으로 dimming. 공생 mutualism.
